creator: xxjack12xx@gmail.com
text:
I am getting an instant kernel panic when try a machine behind the nat tries to access the internet.

I have the following firewall rules in ipfw bge0 being the public interface and bge1 being the private with ip 10.0.0.1

ipfw nat 1 config if bge0 same_ports
ipfw add 100 nat 1 ip4 from any to me in via bge0
ipfw add 101 nat 1 ip4 from 10.0.0.0/24 to any out via bge0
ipfw add allow ip from any to any
